posts.raw_content:
My son-in-law has a special needs brother who is 100% incapable of taking care of himself. He has full-time nursing staff available when his mother isn't home. 

They received a resignation from two of the nurses today..... A lesbian couple.   They said they're moving to the Netherlands because they can't spend another day in the USA with Trump and command. They are lesbians. Both impregnated by their gay boyfriends who will not be father figures at all. The Trump derangement syndrome has them wound up so tight that they just can't live here any longer. Their lives are in danger. 

They've never been to the netherlands.  They literally found a place to rent online and got on a plane today. 

What might a couple idiotic lesbians encounter in the Netherlands? 

I personally find this to be incredible news. We are hoping for the illegals to self deport but now the fagots are. It's a wonderful time to be alive
